headline: Moderna Stock Shoots Up on $2.3 Billion Patent Settlement
summary: Moderna shares rose more than 6% Wednesday morning after the company agreed to pay up to $2.25 billion to two other biotech companies to settle patent litigation over its Covid-19 vaccine.  Despite the expense, analysts said the settlement avoids a worst-case scenario for Moderna of having to pay more to resolve the litigation.  The settlement averts a trial that was scheduled to begin next week.

content.title: Moderna Stock Shoots Up on $2.3 Billion Patent Settlement
content.summary: Moderna shares rose more than 6% Wednesday morning after the company agreed to pay up to $2.25 billion to two other biotech companies to settle patent litigation over its Covid-19 vaccine.  Despite the expense, analysts said the settlement avoids a worst-case scenario for Moderna of having to pay more to resolve the litigation.  The settlement averts a trial that was scheduled to begin next week.

headline: Moderna reaches vaccine settlement, GitLab's guidance disappoints
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stock exchanges, in particular the NASDAQ (^IXIC, ^GSPC, ^DJI), climb following jobs data and news of potential Iran-US negotiations. Moderna (MRNA) shares jump after reaching a settlement concerning its COVID vaccine patent. And GitLab (GTLB) sales slow with the announcement of lackluster 2027 earnings guidance. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

content.title: Moderna reaches vaccine settlement, GitLab's guidance disappoints
content.description:
Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stock exchanges, in particular the NASDAQ (^IXIC, ^GSPC, ^DJI), climb following jobs data and news of potential Iran-US negotiations. Moderna (MRNA) shares jump after reaching a settlement concerning its COVID vaccine patent. And GitLab (GTLB) sales slow with the announcement of lackluster 2027 earnings guidance.

Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
content.summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stock exchanges, in particular the NASDAQ (^IXIC, ^GSPC, ^DJI), climb following jobs data and news of potential Iran-US negotiations. Moderna (MRNA) shares jump after reaching a settlement concerning its COVID vaccine patent. And GitLab (GTLB) sales slow with the announcement of lackluster 2027 earnings guidance.
